brand.tagline: Exploring the Infinite Possibilities of Narrative

games.title: The Phantom Of The Museum
games.description: The Phantom Of The Museum is an indie game that combines elements of puzzle solving and exploration.

games.title: The Tale of Spring City
games.description: Ziqing Xu, a young girl from Spring City. Her father mysteriously disappeared soon after. During a strange turn of events, she suddenly gains the ability to see into the supernatural realm—the so-called "Yin Yan." Will she be able to uncover the truth?

games.title: JiaMa Poker
games.description: JiaMa Poker is a strategy card game that combines elements of puzzle solving and exploration.

items.title: The Tale of Spring City
items.author: Kingdy Jin
items.description: Ziqing Xu, a young girl from Spring City. Her father mysteriously disappeared soon after. During a strange turn of events, she suddenly gains the ability to see into the supernatural realm—the so-called "Yin Yan." Will she be able to uncover the truth?

team.title: Our Team
team.intro: Tunan Studio delves deeply into traditional Chinese folk customs and the cultures of ethnic minorities in Yunnan, using the ninth art form - games - as a medium to convey the beauty of culture to the world.
team.vision: Meanwhile, we are also expanding into the fields of novels and films and television series, striving to achieve cross-media and multi-dimensional breakthroughs and explore the infinite possibilities of narrative.

members.name: Kingdy Jin
members.description: The entire process from start to finish in a one-stop service
